claim_text: Further, the Warburg effect, as part of tumor metabolic reprogramming in which GLY is favored over OXPHOS, is a hallmark of cancer and is particularly pronounced in glioma and other brain tumors2,3,4 .

sub_claims.text: Further, the Warburg effect, as part of tumor metabolic reprogramming in which GLY is favored over OXPHOS, is a hallmark of cancer and is particularly pronounced in glioma and other brain tumors2,3,4 .
